subcodes.first_line: We have, verily, sent down the Utterance and made it a herald from Our presence. Verily thy Lord is the Mighty, the All-Bestowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا البیان و جعلناه مبشرا من عندی ان ربک لهو العزیز الوهاب و اخبرنا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation
